<!-- Chart CH-TIM-04 STACKED AREA, role-based (themeable) -->

## STACKED AREA chart (CH-TIM-04)

Render as SVG (or equivalent) on a 960x540 px canvas.
Colors are ROLES, not hex: resolve each role against the active design
language token block (a DL-xx block pasted next to this one). A role
chain like `benchmark -> muted` means use the first role the palette
defines.

### AI metadata (for agent routing)
```json
{
  "code": "CH-TIM-04",
  "ovp_version": "1.0",
  "intent": [
    "trend",
    "composition",
    "change-over-time"
  ],
  "form": "stacked filled bands over time, bottom-up",
  "data_required": "ordered periods + 2-4 non-negative component series summing to a meaningful total",
  "family": "TIM",
  "alternatives": [
    "CH-TIM-03 (one series)",
    "CH-PTW-01 (few periods)"
  ],
  "see_instead": [
    {
      "when": "single quantity",
      "use": "CH-TIM-03"
    },
    {
      "when": "shares matter more than levels",
      "use": "CH-PTW-02"
    },
    {
      "when": "series cross and levels must be read exactly",
      "use": "CH-TIM-01"
    }
  ]
}
```

Use when:
- how a growing total splits into components over time
- the total AND its composition are both the story

Do NOT use when:
- reading exact middle-band values (baselines wander; CH-TIM-01)
- more than 4 components
- any negative values

### Input data shape
```json
{
  "title": "action title with a number",
  "source": "bottom-left always",
  "unit": "on the top tick",
  "x": "ordered period labels",
  "series": "bottom-up components [{name, values}], largest first"
}
```

```json
      "size": 12,
      "offset": 10
    },

  },
  "scale": {
    "y_zero": true,

    "nice_steps": [
      1,
      2,
      5,
      10
    ],
    "algorithm": "FN-05 nice scale"
  }
}
```

### Rules
- bands ordered largest at the bottom; only the bottom band has a straight baseline
- segments named at their right ends, never a legend
- y starts at zero

### Never do this
- more than 4 bands
- legends
- reading middle bands as levels
- negative components

### QA before delivering
- [ ] <= 4 components, all >= 0
- [ ] largest band at bottom
- [ ] names at band ends
- [ ] unit once
- [ ] source present

### Color roles

| Element | Role chain |
|---|---|
| background | background |
| segments | primary; muted; benchmark -> hairline; gridline |
| gridline | gridline |
| zero_line | hairline |
| tick_label | body |
| x_label | body |
| baseline | ink |
| title | ink |
| source | body |

### Fonts

Title uses the token block's `display` font; everything else uses
`body`. Weight 600 only on highlighted items.
